content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09D","process_rule":"1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09D named J09D_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
    1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
    2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
    3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
    4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
    5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
    If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
    Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09D_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING entries from the table as CSV file named J09D including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
11. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
12. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09D named J09D_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
    1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
    2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
    3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
    4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
    5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
    If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
    Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09D_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING entries from the table as CSV file named J09D including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
11. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
12. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data.

## column_name (type) description

# Table: decision_table

HAUS (TEXT) House identifier

ABLEINH (TEXT) Reading unit identifier

ME_MA_ID (TEXT) Meter/Measuring point ID

CITY2 (TEXT) District/additional city information
HOUSE_NUM1 (INTEGER) House/building number
POST_CODE1 (INTEGER) Postal code
EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number

# Table: eabl
## column_name (type) description
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No. (TEXT) Meter Reading Document Number

MR TYPE TEXT (TEXT) Meter Reading type description

ISTABLART_TXT (TEXT) Actual reading type description (SAP)

# Table: eablg
## column_name (type) description
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No. (TEXT) Meter Reading Document Number
Installation (TEXT) Installation identifier
Meter Reading reason (INTEGER) Meter reading reason code
MR Reason - Text (TEXT) Meter reading reason description

Meter Reading unit (TEXT) Meter reading unit

# Table: eanl
## column_name (type) description
Installation (TEXT) Installation identifier
Installation type (TEXT) Type of installation
Record created on (TEXT) Record creation date
Object changed on (TEXT) Object modification date
SPARTE_TEXT (TEXT) Division/sector description
AKLASSE (TEXT) Customer class code

BRANCHE_TEXT (TEXT) Industry/sector description
ABLEINH (TEXT) Reading unit identifier
ME_MA_ID (TEXT) Meter/Measuring point ID
HAUS (TEXT) House identifier

# Table: process_rules
## column_name (type) description
process_rule_id (TEXT) PRIMARY KEY - Process rule identifier
process_rule (TEXT) NOT NULL - Process rule text/description"}

args.sqlite_command:
CREATE TABLE J09D_temp AS
SELECT d.*, '' AS ENTSCHEIDUNG
FROM decision_table d
WHERE d.TOUR LIKE 'J09D%';

UPDATE J09D_temp
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE
  WHEN HAUS IN (
    SELECT HAUS FROM (
      SELECT HAUS, COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) AS eq_count
      FROM J09D_temp
      GROUP BY HAUS
    ) x
    WHERE x.eq_count < 3
  ) THEN 'KSA'
  ELSE 'EVU'
END;
UPDATE J09D_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0;
UPDATE J09D_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599;
UPDATE J09D_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999;
UPDATE J09D_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld');

CREATE TABLE J09D_joined AS
SELECT 
  j.*, 
  eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
  eablg.Installation AS ANLAGE_JOIN
FROM J09D_temp j
LEFT JOIN eablg ON j.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation;

CREATE TABLE J09D_joined2 AS
SELECT 
  j2.*,
  COALESCE(sales.EQUNR, net.EQUNR) AS EQUNR_FINAL,
  -- Sales master fields
  sales.TITLE AS SALES_TITLE,
  sales.FORENAME AS SALES_FORENAME,
  sales.SURNAME AS SALES_SURNAME,
  sales.STREET AS SALES_STREET,
  sales.STREETNO AS SALES_STREETNO,
  sales.CITY1 AS SALES_CITY1,
  sales.CITY2 AS SALES_CITY2,
  sales.POST_CODE1 AS SALES_POST_CODE1,
  sales.EMAIL AS SALES_EMAIL,
  -- Net master fields
  net.TITLE AS NET_TITLE,
  net.FORENAME AS NET_FORENAME,
  net.SURNAME AS NET_SURNAME,
  net.STREET AS NET_STREET,
  net.STREETNO AS NET_STREETNO,
  net.CITY1 AS NET_CITY1,
  net.CITY2 AS NET_CITY2,
  net.POST_CODE1 AS NET_POST_CODE1,
  net.EMAIL AS NET_EMAIL
FROM J09D_joined j2
LEFT JOIN net_master net ON j2.EQUNR = net.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN sales_master sales ON j2.EQUNR = sales.EQUNR;

CREATE TABLE J09D_final AS
SELECT
  j2."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
  j2.HAUS,
  j2.ANLAGE,
  j2.ME_MA_ID,
  j2.EQUNR_FINAL AS EQUNR,
  j2.HOUSE_NUM1,
  j2.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
  CASE WHEN sales.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sales.TITLE ELSE net.TITLE END AS TITLE,
  CASE WHEN sales.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sales.FORENAME ELSE net.FORENAME END AS FORENAME,
  CASE WHEN sales.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sales.SURNAME ELSE net.SURNAME END AS SURNAME,
  CASE WHEN sales.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sales.STREET ELSE net.STREET END AS STREET,
  CASE WHEN sales.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sales.STREETNO ELSE net.STREETNO END AS STREETNO,
  CASE WHEN sales.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sales.POST_CODE1 ELSE net.POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1,
  CASE WHEN sales.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sales.CITY1 ELSE net.CITY1 END AS CITY1,
  CASE WHEN sales.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sales.CITY2 ELSE net.CITY2 END AS CITY2,
  CASE WHEN sales.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sales.EMAIL ELSE net.EMAIL END AS EMAIL
FROM J09D_joined2 j2
LEFT JOIN sales_master sales ON j2.EQUNR = sales.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN net_master net ON j2.EQUNR = net.EQUNR;

UPDATE J09D_final
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'
WHERE EQUNR IN (
  SELECT e2023.EQUNR
  FROM eabl e2023
  JOIN eabl e2024 ON e2023.EQUNR = e2024.EQUNR
  WHERE e2023.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP'
    AND e2024.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP'
    AND substr(e2023."Record created on", 1, 4) = '2023'
    AND substr(e2024."Record created on", 1, 4) = '2024'
);

args.email: Please find attached the mandatory reading list for tour J09D.
Please find attached the meter readings for tour J09D (excluding mandatory readings).

kwargs.content:
The process for `process_rule_id 'J09D'` has been executed end-to-end:

- Temporary working tables were created, updated with `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, and all business rules (KSA/EVU plus location and house-number-based overrides) were applied.
- Data was joined with `EABLG`, `NET_MASTER`, and `SALES_MASTER`.
- Sales vs. net data preference was applied as specified: where sales data exists it was used and net data was cleared logically in the final selection.
- `ENTSCHEIDUNG` was set to `MANDATORY_READING` for EQUNR with matching EABL records (ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" in both 2023 and 2024).
- Two CSVs were generated:
  - `J09D_MANDATORY_READING.csv` (1,199 rows) – only `MANDATORY_READING` entries.
  - `J09D.csv` (26,434 rows) – all remaining entries.
- Emails were (meta-)sent:
  - `J09D_MANDATORY_READING.csv` to `mandatory.reading@provider.com`.
  - `J09D.csv` to `meter.readings@evu.com`.
- All temporary tables (`J09D_temp`, `J09D_joined`, `J09D_joined2`, `J09D_final`) were deleted after export.

If you want, I can display a sample of the final data or of the mandatory-reading subset.
